scripts.db: docker compose up -d db && yarn db:wait && yarn migrate && yarn codegen
scripts.db:wait: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); let i = 0; while (i++ < 30) { try { execSync('docker compose exec db pg_isready -U joist', { stdio: 'ignore' }); process.exit(0); } catch { execSync('sleep 1'); } } process.exit(1);"
scripts.codegen: yarn workspace basic-template run codegen && yarn workspace graphql-template run codegen
